name: Node.js / TypeScript
description: Node.js / TypeScript project conventions and tooling.
content:
## Tech Stack: Node.js / TypeScript

- Use TypeScript with strict mode enabled.
- Package manager: prefer `npm` (or `pnpm` for monorepos).
- Build: `tsc` | Test: `jest` or `vitest` | Lint: `eslint` | Format: `prettier`
- Use ES modules (`type: module` in package.json).
- Greenfield default: Node.js LTS (latest even-numbered version), TypeScript latest stable.
